{{< pagebreak >}}

# Seven-day reflection {#reflection}

You reached the end of the week — that is worth pausing on. You did not overhaul
your finances; you practiced something quieter and more lasting. Looking back is
part of the practice, and keeping track of progress is linked with a better chance
of reaching a goal.^4^

{{< include assets/worksheets/ws-8-seven-day-reflection.qmd >}}
